title: AgentSession
description: One goal-directed run. final.md section 12.1. Canonical required fields are mandated; implementations may add fields (additionalProperties is open on purpose so the reference Rust crate and future services can extend without breaking interop).

constraints.description: Human-authored guardrails on the run. May be empty but must be present.

initial_capability_ids.description: Grants present at session start. Invariant: a session cannot execute actions without at least one capability grant, so an empty list means the session is inert until a grant is issued.

memory_scope.description: Named memory partition, or null for an ephemeral session with no persistent memory.

journal_root.description: Root reference of the append-only journal for this session.
